rows.label: qev025802_MSG0001
rows.name:
...Now, epidemic that gives
birth to miracles, spread to
all the Ma-non across NLA...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025802_MSG0002
rows.name:
Wha-! You are... What are you
doing in a place like this?![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025802_SEL0011
rows.name: Ask what she was doing to the reservoir.

rows.label: qev025802_SEL0021
rows.name: Say you came to investigate at Staccata's request.

rows.label: qev025802_MSG0004
rows.name:
Um... this medicine bottle
is... It's nothing at all![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025802_MSG0005
rows.name:
Tch! That faithless fool! To send an
interloper all the way out here...![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025802_MSG0006
rows.name:
Ugh... This medicine bottle is...
It's nothing at all, I swear![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025802_MSG0007
rows.name:
Ugh... Is this it?! And just when the
God of Miracles had grown so large
thanks to this medicine, too...![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025802_SEL0031
rows.name: Demand to know what exactly is in the medicine bottle Maluttet is holding.

rows.label: qev025802_MSG0008
rows.name:
Another "Miracle Water" to make the
"Miracle Water" perform miracles...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025802_MSG0009
rows.name:
But... I will not hand this over
to you! Aaah! God of Miracles!
Bring forth a miracle now![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025802_MSG0010
rows.name:
Ugh... I will not hand this over to
someone like you! Aaah! God of
Miracles! Bring forth a miracle now![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025802_MSG0011
rows.name:
Aaah! I can see God...! Fraisie
truly is... the one who guides
the Ma-non... isn't she...[ST:wait ]
